response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong general software engineering capabilities and 15+ years of development experience, he lacks the critical requirements for this embedded networking security role. Most significantly, the resume shows no native-level Japanese proficiency—a listed requirement. His recent career (5+ years) has focused on web/full-stack development with TypeScript and Node.js, moving away from C programming and embedded systems. There is no evidence of expertise in the required security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption systems) or networking protocols (SNMP, NETCONF, Layer 2/3 concepts) that are central to this position.
strengths: Extensive software development experience (15+ years) with demonstrated mastery of testing, TDD, and code quality practices
Proficiency across multiple programming languages including C++ and experience building complex systems
Proven Linux systems expertise and demonstrated ability to quickly learn diverse technology stacks
concerns: Native-level Japanese language proficiency is required but completely absent from resume—a critical blocker
C programming experience is minimal and outdated (last substantial C/C++ work ended 10+ years ago); recent career focuses on modern web languages
No demonstrated expertise in required security technologies (encryption, authentication protocols, intrusion detection) or networking fundamentals (SNMP, NETCONF, Layer 2/3 switching)

key_factors.factor: C programming expertise and embedded systems focus
